data.body:
IMPLEMENTATION NOTES (experimentally validated in sandbox, 2026-06-09):
Validated: .strip().lower() in _readonly() and on the REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE check. Matrix validated: 1/true/TRUE/True/YES/yes/" true " all gate (17 tools vs 31); 0/unset don't; ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE=TRUE/True/1 all enable, bogus doesn't. test_mcp.py + test_surface.py: 11 passed.
COMPANION FIX validated in the same patch (bug tell-cur-bundle / f6f6): in the fsck tool, `if recover and _readonly(): raise ValueError("fsck recover=True is a write operation and is disabled: this server is read-only (REBAR_MCP_READONLY)")` — engine never called under any truthy READONLY spelling.
COORDINATION: if bug said-stilt-brow (9d7c) lands first, its reconcile rewrite already lowercases ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE — only _readonly() + fsck remain here.
